8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_DISCRETEOPERATOR_COEFFICIENTARRAY_H

14 #include <algorithm>
15 #include <ostream>
16 
17 #include <arcane/ArcaneTypes.h>
18 #include <arcane/ItemGroup.h>
19 #include <arcane/ItemTypes.h>

23 #else /* ARCANE_VERSION */
24 #include <arcane/utils/CArray.h>
25 #endif /* ARCANE_VERSION */

28 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ItemGroupMap.h"
29 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
30 
31 using namespace Arcane;
32 
33 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 /*----------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
35 
36 template<typename T>
37 class CoefficientArrayT
38 {
39 public:
44  typedef typename ItemTraitsT<T>::ItemGroupType ItemGroupType;
46  typedef ArrayView<Integer> StencilLocalIdType;
48  typedef ItemVectorView StencilType;
50  typedef ArrayView<Real> CoefficientsType;
52 
57  CoefficientArrayT(FaceGroup face_group, ItemGroupT<T> item_group);
59 
64  void init(const ItemGroupMapT<Face, Integer>& stencil_sizes);
66  void init(const Array<std::pair<ItemGroup, Integer> >& stencil_sizes);
68  void init(const Arcane::VariableFaceInteger& stencil_sizes);
70  virtual ~CoefficientArrayT() {};
72 
77  const FaceGroup & faceGroup() const
78  {
79  return m_face_group;
80  }
82  Integer numberOfCoefficients() const;
84  Integer stencilSize(const Face& F);
86  StencilLocalIdType stencilLocalId(const Face& F);
88  StencilType stencil(const Face& F);
90  CoefficientsType coefficients(const Face& F);
92 
97  ARCANE_DEPRECATED inline Integer getStencilSize(const Face& F)
98  {
99  return this->stencilSize(F);
100  }
102  ARCANE_DEPRECATED inline StencilLocalIdType getStencilLocalId(const Face& F)
103  {
104  return stencilLocalId(F);
105  }
107  ARCANE_DEPRECATED inline StencilType getStencil(const Face& F)
108  {
109  return stencil(F);
110  }
112  ARCANE_DEPRECATED inline CoefficientsType getCoefficients(const Face& F)
113  {
114  return coefficients(F);
115  }
117 
122  void resetCoefficients();
124  void print(std::ostringstream & ostr);
126  template<typename TraceMessageT>
127  void print(TraceMessageT trace);
129 
130 private:
131  FaceGroup m_face_group;
132  SharedArray<Real> m_coefficients;
133  SharedArray<Integer> m_stencils;
134  SharedArray<Integer> m_positions;
135  SharedArray<Integer> m_lengths;
136  ItemInternalList m_item_internal;
137 };
138 
139 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
140 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
141 
142 template<typename T>
143 CoefficientArrayT<T>::CoefficientArrayT(FaceGroup face_group,
144  ItemGroupT<T> item_group)
145  : m_face_group(face_group)
146 {
147  // Initialize item internal representation
148  m_item_internal = item_group.itemFamily()->itemsInternal();
149 }
150 
151 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
152 
153 template<typename T>
154 void CoefficientArrayT<T>::init(const ItemGroupMapT<Face, Integer>& stencil_sizes)
155 {
156  // Compute the maximum number of elements to store
157  // and find maximum id
158  Integer num_el = 0;
159  Integer max_id = 0;
160  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_face_group) {
161  const Face & F = *iF;
162  num_el += stencil_sizes[F];
163  max_id = std::max(max_id, F.localId());
164  }
165 
166  // Make room for positions vector
167  m_positions.resize(max_id + 1);
168  // Make room for lengths vector
169  m_lengths.resize(max_id+1);
170  // Make room for coefficients vector
171  m_coefficients.resize(num_el+1);
172  // Make room for items vector
173  m_stencils.resize(num_el+1);
174 
175  // Fill stencil sizes
176  Integer curr_el = 0;
177  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_face_group) {
178  Integer stencil_size_iF = stencil_sizes[*iF];
179 
180  m_positions[iF->localId()] = curr_el;
181  m_lengths[iF->localId()] = stencil_size_iF;
182  curr_el += stencil_size_iF;
183  }
184  this->resetCoefficients();
185 }
186 
187 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
188 
189 template<typename T>
190 void CoefficientArrayT<T>::init(const Arcane::VariableFaceInteger& stencil_sizes)
191 {
192  // Compute the maximum number of elements to store
193  // and find maximum id
194  Integer num_el = 0;
195  Integer max_id = 0;
196  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_face_group) {
197  const Face & F = *iF;
198  num_el += stencil_sizes[F];
199  max_id = std::max(max_id, F.localId());
200  }
201 
202  // Make room for positions vector
203  m_positions.resize(max_id + 1);
204  // Make room for lengths vector
205  m_lengths.resize(max_id+1);
206  // Make room for coefficients vector
207  m_coefficients.resize(num_el+1);
208  // Make room for items vector
209  m_stencils.resize(num_el + 1);
210 
211  // Fill stencil sizes
212  Integer curr_el = 0;
213  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_face_group) {
214  Integer stencil_size_iF = stencil_sizes[*iF];
215 
216  m_positions[iF->localId()] = curr_el;
217  m_lengths[iF->localId()] = stencil_size_iF;
218  curr_el += stencil_size_iF;
219  }
220  this->resetCoefficients();
221 }
222 
223 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
224 
225 template<typename T>
226 void CoefficientArrayT<T>::init(const Array<std::pair<ItemGroup, Integer> >& stencil_sizes)
227 {
228  // Compute the maximum number of elements to store
229  // and find maximum id
230  Integer num_el = 0;
231  Integer max_id = 0;
232  for(SharedArray<std::pair<ItemGroup, Integer> >::const_iterator i = stencil_sizes.begin(); i != stencil_sizes.end(); i++) {
233  num_el += i->first.size() * i->second;
234  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, i->first) {
235  max_id = std::max(max_id, iF->localId());
236  }
237  }
238 
239  // Make room for positions vector
240  m_positions.resize(max_id + 1);
241  // Make room for lengths vector
242  m_lengths.resize(max_id+1);
243  // Make room for coefficients vector
244  m_coefficients.resize(num_el+1);
245  // Make room for items vector
246  m_stencils.resize(num_el + 1);
247 
248  // Fill stencil sizes
249  Integer curr_el = 0;
250  for(SharedArray<std::pair<ItemGroup, Integer> >::const_iterator i = stencil_sizes.begin(); i != stencil_sizes.end(); i++) {
251  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, i->first) {
252  m_positions[iF->localId()] = curr_el;
253  m_lengths[iF->localId()] = i->second;
254  curr_el += i->second;
255  }
256  }
257  this->resetCoefficients();
258 }
259 
260 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
261 
262 template<typename T>
263 Integer CoefficientArrayT<T>::stencilSize(const Face& F)
264 {
265  return m_lengths[F.localId()];
266 }
267 
268 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
269 
270 template<typename T>
271 Integer CoefficientArrayT<T>::numberOfCoefficients() const
272 {
273  return m_coefficients.size();
274 }
275 
276 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
277 
278 template<typename T>
279 typename CoefficientArrayT<T>::StencilLocalIdType CoefficientArrayT<T>::stencilLocalId(const Face& F)
280 {
281  Integer base = m_positions[F.localId()];
282  Integer length = m_lengths[F.localId()];
283  return StencilLocalIdType(length, &m_stencils[base]);
284 }
285 
286 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
287 
288 template<typename T>
289 typename CoefficientArrayT<T>::StencilType CoefficientArrayT<T>::stencil(const Face& F)
290 {
291  return StencilType(m_item_internal, stencilLocalId(F));
292 }
293 
294 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
295 
296 template<typename T>
297 typename CoefficientArrayT<T>::CoefficientsType CoefficientArrayT<T>::coefficients(const Face& F)
298 {
299  Integer base = m_positions[F.localId()];
300  Integer length = m_lengths[F.localId()];
301  return CoefficientsType(length, &m_coefficients[base]);
302 }
303 
304 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
305 
306 template<typename T>
307 void CoefficientArrayT<T>::resetCoefficients()
308 {
309  m_coefficients.fill(0.);
310 }
311 
312 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
313 
314 template<typename T>
315 void CoefficientArrayT<T>::print(std::ostringstream & ostr)
316 {
317  ENUMERATE_FACE(iF, m_face_group) {
318  const Face & F = *iF;
319  ostr << FORMATF(59,'-') << endl;
320  ostr << "Face "<< F.localId() << std::endl;
321  if(F.isSubDomainBoundary())
322  ostr << FORMATW(20) << "Boundary cell: " << F.boundaryCell().localId() << std::endl;
323  else {
324  ostr << FORMATW(20) << "Back cell: " << F.backCell().localId() << std::endl;
325  ostr << FORMATW(20) << "Front cell: " << F.frontCell().localId() << std::endl;
326  }
327  ostr << FORMATW(20) << "Stencil: " << std::flush;
328  StencilLocalIdType stencil = this->stencilLocalId(F);
329  for(StencilLocalIdType::const_iterator iI=stencil.begin(); iI!=stencil.end(); iI++)
330  ostr << *iI << " " << std::flush;
331  ostr << std::endl;
332 
333  ostr << FORMATW(20) << "Coefficients: " << std::flush;
334  CoefficientsType coefficients = this->coefficients(F);
335  for(CoefficientsType::const_iterator taui=coefficients.begin(); taui!=coefficients.end(); taui++)
336  ostr << *taui << " " << std::flush;
337  ostr<< std::endl;
338  }
339  ostr << FORMATF(59,'-') << endl;
340 }
341 
342 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
343 
344 template<typename T>
345 template<typename TraceMessageT>
346 void CoefficientArrayT<T>::print(TraceMessageT trace)
347 {
348  std::ostringstream ostr;
349  this->print(ostr);
350  trace << ostr.str();
351 }
352 
353 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
354 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
355 
356 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_DISCRETEOPERATOR_COEFFICIENTARRAY_H */
